case_title: WILLIAM M. ABEND VS TURRI HAROLD R.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $810.00 FILED BY WILLIAM M. ABEND AS TO DEFENDANT TURRI HAROLD R. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAM M. ABEND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TURRI HAROLD R. $810.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $830.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-06-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-20-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TURRI HAROLD R.
